title: Figure 4 in Carangoides bartholomaei (Cuvier, 1833) stomach: a source of aspartic proteases for industrial and biotechnological applications
author: Silva, M. K. S.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Figure 4. Yield of Nile tilapia collagen extraction using different methods.ASC (Acid Soluble Collagen), PSC/S (Pepsin Soluble Collagen obtained using porcine commercial pepsin) and PSC/PE (Pepsin Soluble Collagen obtained using PE). Different superscript letters mean statistical differences between extraction methods (p<0.05).
steps_raw: Figure 4. Yield of Nile tilapia collagen extraction using different methods.ASC (Acid Soluble Collagen), PSC/S (Pepsin Soluble Collagen obtained using porcine commercial pepsin) and PSC/PE (Pepsin Soluble Collagen obtained using PE). Different superscript letters mean statistical differences between extraction methods (p<0.05).
